content: The paper frames space-time beamforming as a LEO satellite communications method for narrow beams, while its evidence remains bounded to modeled beamforming assumptions and does not prove deployment success.

citations.title: Space-Time Beamforming for LEO Satellite Communications
citations.quote: The method focuses on space-time beamforming for narrow beams in LEO satellite communications.

citations.title: Space-Time Beamforming for LEO Satellite Communications
citations.quote: The evaluation is bounded by modeled LEO satellite communication assumptions.

claims.claim_text: The paper uses space-time beamforming for narrow LEO satellite beams.

cited_evidence.quote: The method focuses on space-time beamforming for narrow beams in LEO satellite communications.

claims.claim_text: The limitations remain bounded to modeled assumptions.

cited_evidence.quote: The evaluation is bounded by modeled LEO satellite communication assumptions.

claims.rationale: The limitation is grounded but summarized at a higher level.
